description: This is an internal accounting system for a pawnshop. The FedEx API was used to track parcels, and Flash Player to record video and store it on the server. The program allowed tracking all parcels, the movement of precious metals around the firm and packing them into pouches for sending to buyers, and recording the earned money. I developed a library to account for roles on the project (ACL). I also optimized requests to the database, which greatly improved system performance.
team: 3 persons (1x PM, 1x Lead, DevOps, 1x Frontend dev, Backend dev, DevOps)
responsibility: Leading frontend/backend developer: maintaining old code and adding new features
